_about: Labeled micro-benchmark: the 12 ECC snippets from Deloitte 'Skill3 ATTACHMENT 3.docx', each with the verbatim 'What to fix' answer key. Used to score both skill branches. ecc_code is the literal input fed to the skill; expected_* are the structured ground truth derived from the answer key. Verbatim source: _attachment3-raw.txt.

cases.title: FI Line Items — Direct BSEG Read
cases.ecc_code:
DATA: lt_bseg TYPE TABLE OF bseg,
      ls_bseg TYPE bseg.

SELECT * FROM bseg
  INTO TABLE lt_bseg
  WHERE bukrs = '1000'
    AND gjahr = '2023'
    AND belnr = '0100000123'.

LOOP AT lt_bseg INTO ls_bseg.
  WRITE: / ls_bseg-hkont, ls_bseg-dmbtr, ls_bseg-buzei.
ENDLOOP.
cases.expected_fix: Replace BSEG with ACDOCA. Map HKONT → RACCT, BUZEI → DOCLN, BUKRS → RBUKRS. Filter with RLDNR = '0L' for leading ledger.

cases.title: Pricing Conditions — Direct KONV Read
cases.ecc_code:
DATA: lt_konv TYPE TABLE OF konv,
      ls_konv TYPE konv.

SELECT * FROM konv
  INTO TABLE lt_konv
  WHERE knumv = lv_knumv
    AND kposn = '000010'.

LOOP AT lt_konv INTO ls_konv.
  WRITE: / ls_konv-kschl, ls_konv-kbetr, ls_konv-waers.
ENDLOOP.
cases.expected_fix: Replace KONV with PRCD_ELEMENTS. Verify S/4HANA release is 1909 or later. Field names are the same in PRCD_ELEMENTS.

cases.title: Change Documents — Direct CDPOS Read
cases.ecc_code:
DATA: lt_cdpos TYPE TABLE OF cdpos,
      ls_cdpos TYPE cdpos.

SELECT * FROM cdpos
  INTO TABLE lt_cdpos
  WHERE objectid = lv_objectid
    AND tabname  = 'VBAK'.

LOOP AT lt_cdpos INTO ls_cdpos.
  WRITE: / ls_cdpos-fname, ls_cdpos-value_new, ls_cdpos-value_old.
ENDLOOP.
cases.expected_fix: Replace CDPOS with CDPOS_STR for string values or CDPOS_UID for ID-based values. Same fields available in transparent table.

cases.title: FI Document Cluster — RFBLG Access
cases.ecc_code:
DATA: lt_rfblg TYPE TABLE OF rfblg.

SELECT * FROM rfblg
  INTO TABLE lt_rfblg
  WHERE mandt = sy-mandt
    AND bukrs = '1000'.
cases.expected_fix: Rewrite using ACDOCA with appropriate filters. RFBLG cluster cannot be accessed in S/4HANA. Full logic redesign may be required — flag as BLOCKER.

cases.title: HR Payroll Cluster — PCL2 Read
cases.ecc_code:
DATA: lt_pcl2 TYPE TABLE OF pcl2.

SELECT * FROM pcl2
  INTO TABLE lt_pcl2
  WHERE relid = 'RU'
    AND pernr = lv_pernr.
cases.expected_fix: PCL2 cluster abolished. Refer to SAP Note 2409530 for the correct transparent table per cluster ID and infotype. Flag as BLOCKER — HR specialist review required.

cases.title: Material Document — MSEG with Renamed Fields
cases.ecc_code:
DATA: lt_mseg TYPE TABLE OF mseg,
      ls_mseg TYPE mseg.

SELECT m~mblnr m~zeile m~matnr m~werks
       m~menge m~meins m~bwart
  FROM mseg AS m
  INNER JOIN mkpf AS k ON k~mblnr = m~mblnr
                      AND k~mjahr = m~mjahr
  INTO TABLE lt_mseg
  WHERE m~werks = '1000'
    AND m~bwart IN ('101', '261').
cases.expected_fix: MSEG and MKPF still exist but verify field positions via SE11. Test on S/4HANA system and compare field list. Add MANDT explicitly if needed.

cases.title: Sales Order — VBAK with Old Field Reference
cases.ecc_code:
DATA: lt_vbak TYPE TABLE OF vbak,
      ls_vbak TYPE vbak.

SELECT vbeln erdat auart kunnr netwr waerk
  FROM vbak
  INTO TABLE lt_vbak
  WHERE erdat >= '20230101'
    AND auart = 'ZOR'.
cases.expected_fix: VBAK still exists. Run this SELECT on target S/4HANA system in SE16N to verify all field names are valid. Check SD Simplification List items for any changed fields.

cases.title: LIS Statistics — S001 Table Access
cases.ecc_code:
DATA: lt_s001 TYPE TABLE OF s001.

SELECT * FROM s001
  INTO TABLE lt_s001
  WHERE mandt = sy-mandt
    AND spmon >= '202301'.
cases.expected_fix: S001 and all LIS tables abolished. Replace with SAP Embedded Analytics or CDS-based reporting. Custom reports hitting these tables need full redesign. Flag as BLOCKER.

cases.title: FI — BSEG with HKONT and BUZEI (SELECT SINGLE)
cases.ecc_code:
DATA: ls_bseg TYPE bseg.

SELECT SINGLE hkont buzei dmbtr shkzg
  FROM bseg
  INTO (ls_bseg-hkont, ls_bseg-buzei,
        ls_bseg-dmbtr, ls_bseg-shkzg)
  WHERE bukrs = lv_bukrs
    AND belnr = lv_belnr
    AND gjahr = lv_gjahr
    AND buzei = lv_buzei.
cases.expected_fix: Rewrite against ACDOCA. Map: BUKRS→RBUKRS, HKONT→RACCT, BUZEI→DOCLN. Add RLDNR = '0L' for leading ledger. Use SHKZG equivalent HSL sign logic.

cases.title: Pricing — KONV Condition Type Loop
cases.ecc_code:
DATA: lt_konv TYPE TABLE OF konv,
      ls_konv TYPE konv.

SELECT knumv kposn kschl kwert kbetr waers
  FROM konv
  INTO TABLE lt_konv
  WHERE knumv = lv_knumv.

LOOP AT lt_konv INTO ls_konv
  WHERE kschl = 'PR00' OR kschl = 'MWST'.
  lv_total = lv_total + ls_konv-kwert.
ENDLOOP.
cases.expected_fix: Replace KONV with PRCD_ELEMENTS. Same field names. Ensure S/4HANA release is 1909+. Loop logic can remain unchanged after table name is corrected.

cases.title: Change Documents — CDHDR and CDPOS Join
cases.ecc_code:
SELECT h~changenr h~objectid h~udate h~utime
         p~tabname p~fname p~value_new p~value_old
  FROM cdhdr AS h
  INNER JOIN cdpos AS p ON p~changenr = h~changenr
  INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_changes)
  WHERE h~objectclas = 'VERKBELEG'
    AND h~objectid   = lv_vbeln.
cases.expected_fix: Replace CDPOS with CDPOS_STR in the JOIN. CDHDR remains. Test join on target system. CDPOS_STR contains the same fields for string-based change documents.

cases.title: FI — Universal Journal via Old BSEG Pattern
cases.ecc_code:
SELECT hkont kostl SUM( dmbtr ) AS total_amount
  FROM bseg
  INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_balances)
  WHERE bukrs = '1000'
    AND gjahr = '2023'
    AND monat IN ('01', '02', '03')
  GROUP BY hkont kostl.
cases.expected_fix: Rewrite using ACDOCA. Map HKONT→RACCT, KOSTL→KOSTL (same), BUKRS→RBUKRS, MONAT→POPER. Add RLDNR = '0L'. Aggregation logic remains the same.
